title: Minepact
description: Ever wanted to plunge into the world of your favorite cube game? The Minepact mod will help you! With this mod you will plunge into the world of the real game - Genshin Impact!
body:
#  📖 What kind of mod is this?

Minepact is a mod that will add mobs, items and more straight from Genshin Impact to the world of Minecraft! With this mod you will plunge into the cubic Genshin Impact, with this mod survival is completely realizable. An exciting journey awaits you with Minepact.

# You can stay tuned for updates!

- Boosty [https://boosty.to/hastil](https://boosty.to/hastil)
- Discord [https://discord.gg/xQ5HdXTwBf](https://discord.gg/xQ5HdXTwBf)

# Feature
- Mobs from Genshin Impact
- Items from Genshin Impact
- and more...

# Screenshots

![All items and mobs from mod(0.5-alpha)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d14ca86f1a2981c3840007bc7f23e65becbda0.png)
